## Why It Matters

This page is the top-level orientation point for Chainlit. It frames Chainlit as a Python package for production conversational AI and highlights the major runtime concerns the rest of the docs cover: authentication, persistence, multi-step reasoning visibility, deployment surfaces, and framework integrations.

## Key Excerpts

> "Chainlit is an open-source Python package to build production ready Conversational AI."

> "Build fast: Get started in a couple lines of Python"

> "Authentication: Integrate with corporate identity providers and existing authentication infrastructure"

> "Data persistence: Collect, monitor and analyze data from your users"

> "Multi Platform: Write your assistant logic once, use everywhere"

## Capture Notes

- The page is an overview, not an API reference, but it names the product capabilities that matter most for app architecture.
- The docs home explicitly surfaces integrations with LangChain, OpenAI, Mistral AI, Semantic Kernel, Llama Index, and Autogen.
- This is the best upstream entry point for navigating deeper Chainlit runtime and UI documentation.
